name: 60"x20.5" Floor Lamp with Marble Table - Threshold™: Modern Standing Lamp with Polyester Shade
description:
Light up your interiors while adding extra storage to your space with this Floor Lamp with Marble Table from Threshold™. This floor lamp features a white drum shade and a gold-tone metal body with a round pedestal base for a stylish look, and it also has a handy built-in marble table to help you organize your space. The drum shade gives off a soft glow for everyday use, while the 1-way light setting allows for easy operation. Place it next to your sofa in your living room, office or reading nook for practical illumination.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
